en: Users may optionally bind an email address to receive major release updates. Store this only after clear consent.
This project collects reviewed public information and uses AI to help users find source-grounded answers.
Replace this section with the operator name, contact address, and repository link.
AI answers may be incomplete or wrong. Always verify important deadlines, fees, policy, and legal matters with official sources.
Anonymous usage metrics may be recorded for rate limiting and abuse prevention. Optional question logging should be clearly disclosed.
Let users submit suggestions or answer-level feedback. Consider rate limits and an email requirement to reduce abuse.

chatEmpty.en: Ask a question about onboarding, policies, projects, services, facilities, or community life.

items: Knowledge base, upload review, feedback, and admin workflow placeholders.
